source_name: PM&C public fuel supply - MSO fuel reserves
notes: Hand-keyed from PM&C's 'Fuel reserves (ML) held under the minimum stockholding obligation' table. Display value is petrol, diesel and jet fuel reserve volume summed from the published table.

citation: Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet, Public information on fuel supply; DCCEEW MSO reserves table.

fields.includes: Stocks in Australia and on water in Australia's exclusive economic zone, as stated by PM&C.
